by
  -- Prove that q ≠ 0 using the properties of HolderTriple
  have h : (q : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₀
    -- If q were 0, then it would be impossible to form a HolderTriple
    have h₁ := hpqr.2.2
    simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
    <;> aesop
  -- Convert the result back to NNReal
  exact mod_cast h
